name: Cinnamon-Glazed Almonds
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the butter on a sheet pan and heat in an oven set to 325°F until it melts, about 7 minutes.
2. Meanwhile, beat egg whites with a pinch of salt until frothy. Gradually add sugar, beating to stiff peaks.
3. Gently fold in the almonds and cinnamon.
4. Pour the almond mixture onto the sheet pan coated with butter and stir to coat evenly.
5. Bake for about 40 minutes, stirring every 10 minutes, until the almonds are crisp.
6. Serve warm or at room temperature.
Makes 3 cups.
